text:
Created attachment 190639
patch-Makefile1

I made a new port Bug #225836 (elasticsearch6). 
The maintainer was erronousely change by romain tartier to me.
I never requested or wanted the port. I only opened the PR for a new port.

Please, either put it back to the pool, or put it back to tj@FreeBSD.org.
I prefer to tj@ (one maintainer for all elasticsearch ports).
